dataset.competitor_promo: Rival Deli launched 20% off gyros this week on DoorDash

replies.author: Alex T.
replies.original_review: Waited 40 min for a gyro at 11pm, cashier was rude, food was cold.
replies.draft_reply: Hi Alex, we sincerely apologize — this is not our standard. We are reviewing Friday late-night coverage and retraining front-of-house staff immediately. Please DM us for a full refund.

replies.author: Sara K.
replies.original_review: Fatima made the best shawarma I have ever had. I drive 20 min just for this.
replies.draft_reply: Thank you Sara! Fatima is truly one of a kind — we will pass along your kind words directly.

replies.author: Marcus B.
replies.original_review: DoorDash order arrived 25 minutes late and fries were soggy.
replies.draft_reply: Marcus, late delivery is unacceptable — we are addressing the DoorDash dispatch window. Here is a $5 credit for your next order.

pricing_alerts.recommended_action: Counter Rival Deli 20% promo — run 15% off Gyro Platter this weekend
pricing_alerts.detail: Rival Deli launched 20% off gyros on DoorDash. Matching with 15% off protects $3,200 weekend revenue.

temporal_alerts.recommended_action: Staff +2 on Friday 10PM–1AM — projected 1.6x demand spike
temporal_alerts.insight: Friday late-night shows 1.6x normal order volume. Current schedule insufficient.

executive_summary.top_opportunity: Fatima Hassan upsell potential on weekend peak

flagged_items.root_cause: Chicken breast cost up 14% from supplier since Jan
flagged_items.recommended_action: Renegotiate with supplier or switch to thigh cut — saves $680/mo

flagged_items.root_cause: High margin item under-promoted on DoorDash
flagged_items.recommended_action: Feature Loaded Fries as add-on upsell — projected $420/mo revenue lift

cost_creep_alerts.action: Negotiate bulk rate or trial alternate supplier

employees.name: Jordan Lee
flags: Late arrivals on Friday — DoorDash SLA at risk

employee_feedback.frank_briefing_line: Fatima Hassan is this week star — customers drive 20min for her shawarma. Daniel Brooks needs retraining before next health inspection.

warnings.message: Working overtime this week — review hours with manager.
warnings.message_to_employee: Hey Michael — you are at 45hrs this week. Let us adjust next week schedule to keep you at 40.

warnings.message: Health-code concern on record — retraining required.
warnings.message_to_employee: Daniel — mandatory food safety retraining is scheduled for this Thursday 2PM. Attendance required before your next shift.

warnings.message: Punctuality flagged — please check Friday schedule.
warnings.message_to_employee: Jordan — you have had 3 late Friday arrivals this month. DoorDash on-time rate matters for our rating. Can we adjust your Friday start time?

recognitions.message: Exceptional food quality — customers specifically request her dishes.
recognitions.message_to_employee: Fatima — a customer wrote they drive 20 minutes just for your shawarma. Thank you for representing Marathon Deli so well.
recognitions.action: Consider for employee of the month

recognitions.message_to_employee: Priya — you scored 100/100 in customer satisfaction this week. Incredible consistency.
